title: Anti Item Frame
description: A Minecraft mod that blocks you from placing items into an item frame (now also decorated pots). Helpful for PvP
body:
This mod disables the ability to put items into item frames (now also decorated pots). This is helpful, because players can place item frames to bait the user into placing their items into it.

![Mod example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/985779c2d2ba47b1419e8a5721252ee006899ea3.png)
